/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/chiriksip.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/chiriksip.dir/chiriksip_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chiriksip.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chiriksip.dir/src/mainwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chiriksip.dir/src/sipclient.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chiriksip.dir/src/audiobridge.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chiriksip.dir/src/ringtone.cpp.o -o chiriksip  /usr/lib64/libQt6Widgets.so.6.11.1 -lpjsua2 -lstdc++ -lpjsua -lpjsip-ua -lpjsip-simple -lpjsip -lpjmedia-codec -lpjmedia-videodev -lpjmedia-audiodev -lpjmedia -lpjnath -lpjlib-util -lpj -lportaudio /usr/lib64/libQt6Gui.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib64/libGLX.so /usr/lib64/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib64/libQt6Core.so.6.11.1
